name_en: Saint Laurent Mini 🆕 High-profile arrival🔥🔥🔥 Y-shaped badge envelope shoulder bag. Due to the bag's shape, the lining requires reverse stitching during production, so the leather quality is extremely high. Too brittle will wrinkle, too soft will lack structure and elasticity. After repeated prototyping, this boutique piece is finally presented to everyone💪💪Size: 20cm
